title: Reorder List
prompt: Given a singly linked list L0 → L1 → … → Ln-1 → Ln, reorder it to L0 → Ln → L1 → Ln-1 → L2 → Ln-2 → … in place.
hints: Find the middle, reverse the second half, then merge two halves alternately.
Use slow/fast for the middle. Cut the list at slow.next = null after computing middle.

alternatives.approach: Copy to array, two pointers, rebuild links

pitfalls: Forgetting to terminate the first half (slow.next = null).
